od_description: Short (3.3 km) near-stationary activity around the Pampore terminal (both endpoints within ~1.4 km of Pampore; the 'Srinagar' geocode is a mislabel of a point next to Pampore).
stops_verdict: Dominated by dwell (74% of time); not a boarding-stop pattern — looks like idling/layover near the Pampore stand.
narrative: LIKELY ARTIFACT, not a real service. 3.3 km, effective 4.6 km/h, dwell share 74%, only 2 drivers / 6 runs, evening-only — both endpoints sit within ~1.4 km of the Pampore terminal. This is near-stationary activity (idling/short shuffles around the Pampore stand) that slipped through run segmentation, not a bus corridor. No permit match (≤0.34). EXCLUDE from corridor findings.
evidence_used: effective speed 4.6 km/h + dwell share 74% = mostly stopped
both endpoints ~1.4 km apart, around Pampore; 'Srinagar' geocode is next to Pampore
